# Public Discovery And Asset Reference

The public tree contains **75 tracked files**. Generated feeds and discovery manifests are release artifacts; article covers, diagrams, logo, favicon, crawler policy, CNAME, and security contact are durable inputs.

| Public file | Purpose |
|---|---|
| [public/.nojekyll](https://github.com/flytohub/flyto-blog/blob/main/public/.nojekyll) | Public article or site asset. |
| [public/.well-known/security.txt](https://github.com/flytohub/flyto-blog/blob/main/public/.well-known/security.txt) | Responsible disclosure contact policy. |
| [public/CNAME](https://github.com/flytohub/flyto-blog/blob/main/public/CNAME) | GitHub Pages custom-domain contract. |
| [public/atom.xml](https://github.com/flytohub/flyto-blog/blob/main/public/atom.xml) | Generated feed discovery surface. |
